reasoning: Both audits skipped due to makepkg failing to download sources (local file dependencies). No critical files were reviewed, leaving build/install logic unaudited.
false_negatives: Potential risks in unaudited prepare/package functions (e.g., unsafe patchelf usage)
Unverified helper script execution during installation
Possible embedded scripts/executables in unaudited AppImage/ZIP
learnings: Tool must handle file:// sources by allowing manual source placement
Prioritize helper scripts referenced in PKGBUILD even when sources are missing
Audit PKGBUILD functions independently when source download fails
Add warning when >50% of critical files are skipped
